rules.title: Pool negative start only via state connection
Converters and traders require input and output connections
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Node semantics -> Converters and traders

rules.title: Gate cannot mix percent and ratio weights
Trigger gate uses state connections only
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Node semantics -> Trigger gates

rules.title: End conditions accept state connections only
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Node semantics -> End conditions

rules.title: End conditions are checked every step and stop immediately
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Node semantics -> End conditions

rules.title: Resource tokens are positive integers
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Connection semantics -> Resource connections

rules.title: State connection default formula is plus one
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Connection semantics -> State connections

rules.title: Formula modifiers apply additive signed deltas for next step
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Connection semantics -> Formula modifiers

rules.title: Pull/push any vs all semantics
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Trigger and action controls -> Pull/push actions

rules.title: Variable names are case-sensitive
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Variables and formula system

rules.title: Random interval bounds are inclusive
rules.source_section: Deep dive -> Variables and formula system -> Randomness supports

expected.descriptor: Pool initializes with zero resources when initial amount is omitted.
Negative Pool state is only legal after a State Connection modifies the value.
A negative Pool blocks outbound flow and accepts inbound flow until positive.
Pool storage rejects or normalizes direct fractional values to integer semantics.
Converter/Trader execution requires at least one input and one output resource edge.
Sorting Gate validation fails when percentage and ratio weights are mixed.
Trigger Gate definitions with resource inputs are invalid.
End Condition accepts only State Connection inputs.
Simulation stops in the same step where any End Condition evaluates true.
Resource Connection transfer units are treated as positive integers.
State Connection formula defaults to +1 when omitted.
Formula Modifier effects are additive and applied to next-step formula value with signed syntax.
any modes consume available amounts; all modes require full specified amounts.
Variable references differ by case and must match exact name.
Random interval sampling includes both lower and upper bounds.
